quality_details.build_status: failing - rolldown parse error in App.tsx

summary: Identified rolldown/vite build parsing error in App.tsx at closing brace of function. The issue persists despite multiple fixes - tests pass (2565 client, 232 server) but build fails with rolldown parser error. TypeScript compilation succeeds, suggesting this is a rolldown-specific JSX parsing issue with complex nested ternary expressions.
next_action: Investigate rolldown parse error - may require simplifying App.tsx JSX structure or upgrading rolldown version. Alternative: extract problematic components to separate files to isolate parsing issue.
